{{Quote|Stop trying to pretend innocence, Princess Leia...! ...Or... do you ''enjoy'' those paralysis beams?|Cronal|<ref name="GW" />}}
'''Paralysis beams''' were a type of immobilizing beam, based on gravitational technology like [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsors]] that held prisoners in place. During the [[Mission to Vorzyd V|mission]] to [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia]] and two other Rebels were captured by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Cronal]] and held by paralysis beams while being [[Torture/Legends|interrogated]] for information.
